valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Mon 20 Apr 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Tue 21 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Southeast Iceland 1032 expected just south of Iceland 1041 by midnight tonight. New low expected Trafalgar 999 by same time. Low Viking 1021 losing its identity. High FitzRoy 1016 dissipating

Showers at first, fog patches.

Moderate or good, occasionally very poor.

In south, variable 2 to 4, becoming easterly or southeasterly 3 to 5, increasing 5 to 7 later. In north, easterly or southeasterly 4 to 6, occasionally 3 in southwest.

In south, thundery showers, fog patches. In north, occasional rain or showers.
